description: Season 13 update introducing new open-world bosses, economy changes, castle reworks, and combat balance adjustments.

sections.heading: Season 13 Changes
sections.description: Overview of Season 13 adjustments and competitive focus.
items: Guild Season 13 begins on June 19
Focus on open-world and competitive guild improvements

sections.heading: Open-World Mobs: Additions and Changes
sections.description: New mobs and improvements to open-world encounters.
items: Added Crystal Spider rare boss with high-value loot and Season Points
Added Treasure Drone roaming loot carriers
Open-world mobs periodically reroll into higher-value encounters
sections.searchable_text: crystal spider treasure drone open world mobs

changes.raw_text: New roaming boss with high rewards
Roaming loot carrier with scalable rewards
notes: Drops Avalonian Artifacts, Energy, Silver, fragments
Rarity and tier scale with zone

sections.heading: Mob and World Boss Changes
sections.description: Adjustments to spawn timers and rewards.
items: World boss spawn time increased from 1h to 2h
Season Points for world bosses doubled
Fame from roaming mobs and Siphoning Mages doubled
Adjusted Season Point scaling by Outlands position
sections.searchable_text: world boss spawn fame season points scaling

sections.heading: Castle and Castle Outpost Changes
items: Wider bridges for castle entrances
Added staircase for defender positioning
Doubled loot value of Castle Outpost chests

sections.heading: Resource and Transmutation Changes
items: Doubled spawn rate of rare (.2) resources
Quadrupled spawn rate of exceptional (.3) resources
Increased transmutation costs overall
Increased T5+ resource respawn rates by 20%
Reduced transmutation costs for artifact materials

sections.heading: 20v20 Crystal League Change
items: Merged Level 2 and 3 participation focus
Level 1-2 matches daily
Level 3 matches twice weekly

sections.heading: Disarray Changes
items: Steeper Disarray curve for large groups
Higher penalties for large player stacking

sections.heading: Safety from Instances in the Open World
items: Exit shield bubble reduced to 50m
Full shield only applied at main zone entrances

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes
items: Corpses cannot be looted during active matches
Lava deaths now grant PvP Fame to opposing team

sections.heading: New Avatar Rings Available
items: Farmer Ring
Crossed Axes Ring
Fisherman Ring
Necromancer Ring

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Players cannot be displaced into zone exits
Improved mobile drag precision

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Adjustments to healing, armor, and helmets.
sections.searchable_text: combat balance holy nature armor helmet

changes.raw_text: Reworked to channel and grant stacking resistances
notes: Grants resistances and CC resistance per enemy entering

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed guild/alliance chat disappearing after reset
Removed obsolete Crystal League tokens
Corrected tradability indicators
Fixed Frost Staff root stacking requirement
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes chat crystal league frost staff
